## Qaid v0.5.0 — Trix

Adds **Trix**, a kingdom-based trick-game mode — the first new game since the React rewrite.

### Added

- **Trix mode** — 4 players, 4 kingdoms (each player is King once). Each kingdom is the 5 contracts {King of Hearts, Queens, Diamonds, Tricks, Trix}; the game ends when all 4 kingdoms are complete and the **lowest** total wins. ([442975b](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/442975b))
- **Free contract-merging** — the 4 penalty contracts can be merged into one deal in any grouping the King chooses (2, 3, or all 4 together); Trix is always solo. A per-deal zero-sum checksum guards entry. ([d566346](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/d566346))
- **2v2 partnership (default)** — partners across (seats 0&2 vs 1&3); deals are entered per-player, teams roll up standings/winner. Individual mode is still available. ([fd3bed2](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/fd3bed2))
- **Team-based penalty entry in 2v2** — "who took it" is entered per team; each team's amount lands on its first seat so the per-player matrix still rolls up. ([2bbbef4](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/2bbbef4))
- **Declaring / doubling** — King of Hearts (×2 → 150) and Queens **per-queen** (a deal can mix declared ×50 + normal ×25); Naghil first-finisher reward. ([424e0fb](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/424e0fb), [5dfc723](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5dfc723))
- **History grouping by kingdom**, per-deal contract labels, share text/image standings, and recent-game reopen-for-editing — all Trix-aware. ([4d79ba8](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/4d79ba8))
- **Arabic glossary** renamed to the user's dialect terms (الالعاب / لعبه / باش الحاس / ميمات / ديامن / اكلات / معلون / تركس). ([b122fd0](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/b122fd0))

### State shape

Additive and **legacy-compatible**. `cardScoreTracker_v1` gains one optional `trixMatch` field (per-deal metadata, index-aligned with `scores`); the sanitizer validates and preserves it. No key renames, no migration — states from older builds load unchanged.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 234/234 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds — prompt-mode service worker, 17-entry Workbox precache (~367 KiB)
- Individual + 2v2 flows, contract-merging, declaring/doubling, History edit, and share all verified in live preview throughout development
